en: Buy weapons on the left, or manage equipped weapons on the right.
zh_CN: 在左侧购买武器，或在右侧管理已装备武器。

en: Select a weapon on the right, review changes, then upgrade.
zh_CN: 在右侧选择武器，确认属性变化后再强化。

en: Select one route for this level.
Newly obtained weapons trigger the current weapon's evolution effects.
zh_CN: 新获得的武器会触发当前武器的进化效果。

en: Choose one reward for completing an objective this battle.
zh_CN: 选择一项本轮完成任务获得的奖励。

en: Objective complete. Rewards will be delivered in the Rest Area.
zh_CN: 任务完成，奖励将在休息区发放。

en: Added to Ready To Install. Deploy it from Board > Task Management before the next battle.
zh_CN: 已加入待部署任务模组。请在下一场战斗前进入 格子 > 任务管理 进行部署。

en: Install task modules on active cells before the next battle.
zh_CN: 开战前把任务模组部署到已激活格子。

en: Select or drag a task module to an active cell. Up to {limit} tasks can be deployed for the next battle.
zh_CN: 选择或拖拽任务模组到已激活格子。下一场战斗最多部署 {limit} 个任务。

en: Click a highlighted active cell to deploy. Right click to cancel selection.
zh_CN: 点击高亮的已激活格子进行部署。右键取消选择。

en: Hover a deployed task cell to preview details. Click to pin the detail window.
zh_CN: 悬停已部署任务格子预览详情。点击可固定详情窗口。

en: Deployed tasks are consumed when battle starts. Undeployed Ready To Install tasks will be discarded.
zh_CN: 已部署任务会在开战时消耗。未部署的待部署任务会被丢弃。

en: No task modules. Complete cell objectives to earn more.
zh_CN: 没有任务模组。完成格子任务可获得更多。

en: You have {count} unassigned task module(s). Starting battle will discard them. Deployed tasks will be consumed for the next battle.
zh_CN: 你有 {count} 个未部署任务模组。开战会丢弃它们。已部署任务会在下一场战斗中消耗。

zh_CN: 操作提示已被设置隐藏。

en: Controls setting is Always Expanded. Change it to Adaptive to collapse hints.
zh_CN: 当前设置为始终展开；切换为智能显示后才能收起提示。

en: Adaptive opens new hints and lets F1 collapse them. Always Expanded keeps hints open. Hidden hides the panel.
zh_CN: 智能显示会展开新提示，F1 只临时收起；始终展开会保持提示展开；隐藏会关闭提示面板。

en: Rest area uses mouse-first interaction. Battle uses keyboard + mouse.
